plugins.prepareCmd: mkdir -p ./release-evidence ./release-evidence/attestations && dotnet build --configuration Release -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet pack --no-build --configuration Release --include-symbols --include-source --output ./nupkgs -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet CycloneDX Hexalith.FrontComposer.slnx -o ./release-evidence/sbom --json --disable-github-licenses && python eng/release_evidence.py inventory --root . --expected eng/release-package-inventory.json --output ./release-evidence/package-inventory.json && dotnet nuget sign ./nupkgs/*.nupkg --certificate-path "$NUGET_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_PATH" --certificate-password "$NUGET_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD" --timestamper "$NUGET_SIGNING_TIMESTAMPER" --output ./nupkgs-signed && dotnet nuget verify ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --all --verbosity normal > ./release-evidence/signing-verification.txt && if [ "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" = "attested" ]; then if gh attestation verify ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --repo "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY" --signer-workflow "Hexalith/Hexalith.FrontComposer/.github/workflows/release.yml" --format json > ./release-evidence/attestations/attestation-bundle.json.tmp; then mv ./release-evidence/attestations/attestation-bundle.json.tmp ./release-evidence/attestations/attestation-bundle.json; else rm -f ./release-evidence/attestations/attestation-bundle.json.tmp; exit 1; fi; fi && python eng/release_evidence.py release-budget --evidence ./release-evidence/release-budget-history.json --append-current --started-at "$RELEASE_STARTED_AT" --tag v${nextRelease.version} --run-id "$GITHUB_RUN_ID" --publish-status pre-publish --output ./release-evidence/release-budget-prepublish.json && python eng/release_evidence.py checksums --root . --pattern 'nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg' --pattern 'nupkgs/*.snupkg' --pattern 'release-evidence/sbom/**/*.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/signing-verification.txt' --pattern 'release-evidence/attestation-unavailable.md' --pattern 'release-evidence/attestations/*.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/test-results.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/release-budget-prepublish.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/concurrency-guard.json' --output ./release-evidence/checksums.json && python eng/release_evidence.py prepare-manifest --root . --inventory ./release-evidence/package-inventory.json --checksums ./release-evidence/checksums.json --signing-verification ./release-evidence/signing-verification.txt --attestation-bundle ./release-evidence/attestations/attestation-bundle.json --version ${nextRelease.version} --tag v${nextRelease.version} --benchmark-summary-hash "$(sha256sum ./release-evidence/release-budget-prepublish.json | cut -d' ' -f1)" --attestation-status "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" --output ./release-evidence/pre-publish-manifest.json --diagnostics-output ./release-evidence/manifest-diagnostics.json && python eng/release_evidence.py seal-manifest --manifest ./release-evidence/pre-publish-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json && python eng/release_evidence.py partial-publish-incident --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-placeholder.json --phase none --classification none --tag v${nextRelease.version} && python eng/release_evidence.py partial-publish-incident --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-incident.json --phase none --classification none --tag v${nextRelease.version} && printf '{"status":"no-prior-release","tag":"v${nextRelease.version}"}\n' > ./release-evidence/prior-release.json && python eng/release_evidence.py verify-manifest --root . --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/release-verification.json
plugins.publishCmd: python eng/release_evidence.py verify-manifest --root . --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json && release_dry_run_lower=$(printf '%s' "${RELEASE_DRY_RUN:-true}" | tr -d '[:space:]' | tr 'A-Z' 'a-z') && { case "$release_dry_run_lower" in false|0|no) is_dry_run=false ;; *) is_dry_run=true ;; esac; if [ "$is_dry_run" = "true" ]; then python eng/release_evidence.py classify-release --root . --evidence-root ./release-evidence --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --test-results ./release-evidence/test-results.json --output ./release-evidence/release-readiness.json --require-publishable --dry-run-clean-exit --semantic-release-state matches --concurrent-same-version "$RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION" --event-name "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" --ref "$GITHUB_REF" --ref-protected "$GITHUB_REF_PROTECTED" --from-fork "$RELEASE_FROM_FORK" --dry-run true --run-attempt "${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT:-1}" --owner-approved "$RELEASE_OWNER_APPROVED" --approver "$RELEASE_APPROVER" --approval-mechanism "$RELEASE_APPROVAL_MECHANISM" --attestation-status "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" --fallback-approved-at "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_APPROVED_AT" --fallback-approver "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_APPROVER" --fallback-expires-at "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_EXPIRES_AT" --fallback-approved-against-fingerprints-sha256 "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_FINGERPRINTS_SHA256" --concurrency-guard ./release-evidence/concurrency-guard.json; classifier_rc=$?; if [ $classifier_rc -ne 0 ]; then exit $classifier_rc; fi; echo 'Dry-run classification complete; halting before publish side effects. (CR-12-4-P214 round-8: defense-in-depth — primary dry-run path uses `npx semantic-release --dry-run` and never invokes this branch; this fallback exit 1 prevents @semantic-release/github + @semantic-release/git from firing if publishCmd is reached during a dry-run via a future semantic-release config change.)' >&2; exit 1; fi; } && { prior_stderr=$(mktemp 2>/dev/null || echo ./release-evidence/.prior-tag-stderr.$$); same_version_stderr=$(mktemp 2>/dev/null || echo ./release-evidence/.same-version-stderr.$$); trap 'rm -f "$prior_stderr" "$same_version_stderr"' EXIT; prior_release_response=$(gh api "repos/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/releases/tags/v${nextRelease.version}" 2>"$prior_stderr"); gh_rc=$?; if [ $gh_rc -eq 0 ]; then if printf '%s' "$prior_release_response" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; json.dump(json.load(sys.stdin), sys.stdout)' > ./release-evidence/prior-release.json.tmp 2>/dev/null; then mv ./release-evidence/prior-release.json.tmp ./release-evidence/prior-release.json; RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION=true; else rm -f ./release-evidence/prior-release.json.tmp; printf '{"status":"probe-malformed-response","tag":"v${nextRelease.version}"}\n' > ./release-evidence/prior-release.json; echo 'CR-12-4-P212: prior-tag probe returned non-JSON body; failing closed' >&2; RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION=true; fi; elif grep -q 'HTTP 404\|Not Found' "$prior_stderr" 2>/dev/null; then :; else echo "Prior-tag probe failed transient (rc=$gh_rc): $(cat "$prior_stderr" 2>/dev/null)" >&2; exit 1; fi; set +e; if ! printf '%s' "${GITHUB_RUN_ID:-}" | grep -Eq '^[0-9]+$'; then echo "CR-12-4-P254 round-11: GITHUB_RUN_ID is empty or non-numeric (value='${GITHUB_RUN_ID:-}'); same-version probe cannot exclude the current run — failing closed." >&2; same_version_runs=""; same_version_rc=2; else same_version_response=$(gh api "repos/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/actions/runs?status=in_progress&per_page=100" 2>"$same_version_stderr"); same_version_gh_rc=$?; if [ $same_version_gh_rc -eq 0 ] && printf '%s' "$same_version_response" | python3 -c 'import json,sys' >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '%s' "$same_version_response" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); sys.exit(1) if isinstance(d, dict) and isinstance(d.get("workflow_runs"), list) else sys.exit(0)' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "CR-12-4-P254 round-11: same-version probe returned a GitHub API error envelope or malformed shape (200 OK without a workflow_runs array — rate-limit, partial response, or unexpected payload); failing closed." >&2; same_version_runs=""; same_version_rc=2; else same_version_runs=$(printf '%s' "$same_version_response" | jq --arg run_id "$GITHUB_RUN_ID" "[.workflow_runs[]? | select(.path | endswith(\".github/workflows/release.yml\")) | select(.display_title | test(\"(^|[^0-9.])v${nextRelease.version}([^0-9.]|$)\")) | select(.id != (\$run_id | tonumber))] | length"); same_version_rc=$?; fi; fi; set -e; if [ $same_version_rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "Same-version run probe failed transient (rc=$same_version_rc): $(cat "$same_version_stderr" 2>/dev/null)" >&2; RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION=true; elif ! printf '%s' "${same_version_runs:-}" | grep -Eq '^[0-9]+$'; then echo "Same-version run probe returned non-numeric result; failing closed." >&2; RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION=true; elif [ "$same_version_runs" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Detected $same_version_runs other in-flight release run(s) targeting v${nextRelease.version}; failing closed." >&2; RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION=true; fi; } && python eng/release_evidence.py classify-release --root . --evidence-root ./release-evidence --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --test-results ./release-evidence/test-results.json --output ./release-evidence/release-readiness.json --require-publishable --semantic-release-state matches --concurrent-same-version "$RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION" --event-name "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" --ref "$GITHUB_REF" --ref-protected "$GITHUB_REF_PROTECTED" --from-fork "$RELEASE_FROM_FORK" --dry-run "$RELEASE_DRY_RUN" --run-attempt "${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT:-1}" --owner-approved "$RELEASE_OWNER_APPROVED" --approver "$RELEASE_APPROVER" --approval-mechanism "$RELEASE_APPROVAL_MECHANISM" --attestation-status "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" --fallback-approved-at "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_APPROVED_AT" --fallback-approver "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_APPROVER" --fallback-expires-at "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_EXPIRES_AT" --fallback-approved-against-fingerprints-sha256 "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_FINGERPRINTS_SHA256" --concurrency-guard ./release-evidence/concurrency-guard.json && (dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --skip-duplicate || (python eng/release_evidence.py partial-publish-incident --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-incident.json --phase package-push --tag v${nextRelease.version} && exit 1)) && (dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs/*.snupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --skip-duplicate || (python eng/release_evidence.py partial-publish-incident --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-incident.json --phase symbol-push --tag v${nextRelease.version} && exit 1))
